# Clean file — no secrets, used to verify zero false positives.

# Ordinary configuration
APP_NAME=my-app
LOG_LEVEL=debug
CACHE_TTL=300
MAX_RETRIES=3
DATABASE_HOST=localhost
DATABASE_PORT=5432
DATABASE_NAME=myapp_db

# Feature flags
FEATURE_NEW_UI=true
FEATURE_ANALYTICS=false

# A URL without embedded credentials
API_BASE_URL=https://api.example.com/v1

# Short strings that look like they could be secrets but are too short
KEY=short
TOKEN=tiny
